title: [Kobold Village, Shaman's Hut]
description: A half-collapsed tent of stitched hides leans against a crooked totem pole carved with too many eyes.  The air reeks of sage, cheap incense, and something unmistakably like burnt hair.  Shelves sag beneath jars of teeth, dried roots, and a cracked crystal orb that emits a low hum.  Atop a cluttered table rests a variety of carved bones, clumps of wax, and a crystallized sea blue eyeball.
